textByHash.021ac2aff263c150c299b20d08a6d1b54e9875e5: That's great! I'd say it's about time for your reward. But first, let's have a look at this head...
textByHash.065297075b209604149a7fca24749855a51b6788: I'm sorry, but no. I agreed to pay you for a head and you don't have one.
textByHash.078655487bb2563a63eda82b92991783a03cee5a: No head, no reward. Come back once you have it!
textByHash.0df39860e123664c95f9c9853d070d8edd9ba97f: Well there's fur this time. It does look like an actual head, I have to admit.
textByHash.16ed020f3474c6641ecec9be2192fae2e55477e5: It's mainly been going for the cattle. I fixed up a new gate which has kept it out the past couple of nights. Not sure how long it will hold though.
textByHash.185d7fd629a143575922c6c48db4f6eea9ec6792: Well hang on just a moment...
textByHash.1ed5e10fcfb92874d8f74d2f3fc596d1ccd61b77: I can see this is the head of a bear! This beast we're dealing with is more than a mere bear though!
textByHash.23f98d42e10124f371405f078d0d87cb1264c456: Lord Hosidius made a deal with Lord Shayzien and the lizardmen were cleared out to make room for the Farming Guild.
textByHash.2728b1e188d644319cdc8132a68a47ee787b1d14: Wonderful! Do you have the head?
textByHash.2826ca7430f286836440843aa6c1b7fb07629e6c: Its head? This is its head?
textByHash.2cbd75d84e32d078b3a9832e46267758bcc249f9: Well I can't pay you if you don't have the head.
textByHash.33e6baaa3979e58799da91aae3cad898602fe3d9: Have you mounted the head of the beast yet?
textByHash.3b89168b47081ac2a6d62e919ac4396dada63e93: You look like you know your way around a weapon. If you can kill the beast and bring me its head as proof, I'll ensure you are compensated for your trouble.
textByHash.3d7d2287171f07c49edb8066e93177275ef4868c: I think we're good. Thank you for the offer though.
textByHash.41a913ce2e10f3468b3bf988b5beee8a169251bd: Nope. Not too long ago you couldn't safely travel around these parts. Too many lizardmen. But then some Hosidius explorers discovered how fertile this land was.
textByHash.4bc479e9128fc0edb1167cccf199cc04192c34bf: Thank you. We built it ourselves.
textByHash.4c03b0c3175cb8213b6f1249df5655c91b251584: Hello again. Any luck finding that beast?
textByHash.5d76957cf235a04b49dae022ee8181f447a45e20: Do you have the head of that beast yet? Or do you just have more clay?
textByHash.63eeed499e6dfc5cfc5c377690593b6a097c12e8: Of course not! Besides, these bones could be from anywhere.
textByHash.69b9f9a235138ea33bf2505e0cc9c73edffdfc13: It's falling apart... What creature is this?
textByHash.6f9db775c5ecf306be833a655b213f918cd9b240: It's called a bloodbear but it doesn't have blood? Did a fool name it?
textByHash.77fdde82fe8f6b74d87671328850c9944da6113d: Maybe you killed the wrong beast? It doesn't make sense that a headless beast would be taking cattle. How would it eat them?
textByHash.79cbb1160e80fc2896bd345ece7367b3e8274ca9: Hello there. Not too bad, thanks.
textByHash.7a4e15164b3871858d4613946a07e720aebe78dd: Thank you friend. See you later.
textByHash.80523d81fd4366131355c5b9dd8039dc0d3178b7: Proof? This doesn't seem like proof to me. Anyone could have written this. Maybe you wrote it?
textByHash.8569fb05e87d7bfbc45816d41b5002832bab37c8: Have you mounted the head of the beast in our home yet?
textByHash.86d7218dda3a00e23b8ce50eb0ce512aef5bb6b5: Well it can't be living too far from here. You might want to check with my wife, Mary. Perhaps she's seen something I haven't.
textByHash.89e6d0ab97c6e2e7014bee8c3af5868c8b8d2e40: Well let me know once you have and I'll give you your reward.
textByHash.92993eb91ee470a03df001727ef11ce7661b1986: Well it can't be living too far from here, but I don't know exactly where. You might want to check with my wife, Mary. Perhaps she's seen something I haven't.
textByHash.9a43b4ccc042e57cf8a7f839e8b5664169ced1d5: Do you have the head of that beast yet? Or do you just have more fakes?
textByHash.9ca981ffcd035845824a48b447cb097d4cdc2efb: Well if you manage to get hold of the beast's head, let me know. Until then, I can't pay you.
textByHash.9da3a441bcf0ad5acb4c9d8ab279d3439dc87393: That's not what I meant. Look, it's nothing personal, but I can't be seen paying someone if they didn't do the job.
textByHash.a1cc3f98ffb31c2159df4776b5ea663dbfe98f25: Well you would say that. I'm sorry but I'm not having this. Come back when you have the head of the beast.
textByHash.a1eaeb05170c08a761b7a420da6bf34b2914a62b: Come back once you have the real head of the beast!
textByHash.aa99259f8dbd1cdd40912607e103838deeada105: Recently, some strange beast has been stealing our livestock at night. The soldiers are too busy dealing with the lizardmen to help, so we haven't been able to stop it.
textByHash.b6fe29c550387b08e7b272e5b97325fd26ef0d0c: But this just looks like clay... It feels like clay...
textByHash.bb1cd97e8b77e23cb725091d09699ea176672761: Okay... So what is the answer?
textByHash.be7d02e24f83decc875198c5b575f91b031b5ec9: Yes, I think this is the head of a beast.
textByHash.be9183c7b1a48f259e9935dbb04e484e2cf8fd54: Bones? I don't want bones! I want the beast's head!
textByHash.c06d8579770c42dcbaa9d10ff48d4f926cbdfd74: What? But this is clearly just part of a costume!
textByHash.c296f1ec8878eed3195b79b69e73200eadce13e3: It's wonderful! This is clearly the head of the beast! Well done adventurer!
textByHash.c91182b01319319f2a50853712296bf106a3c4ea: You must take me for an idiot! This is some head you bought from a taxidermist or something. It's clearly not a fresh kill!
textByHash.c9fbf5231abc729bce46d88b3545e117dfe2da34: The name's Gordon. Good day to you.
textByHash.d8ba2d277b799d846ff5ea916ae9d66cdabe1ba8: Where's the blood? If this is a fresh kill, the head should have blood on.
textByHash.dcab1c36e07cb09cabe6bb23151fab8eabdfebe2: We've dealt with bears before! This is clearly something more! Now, go and find the real beast!
textByHash.e2920e66d616c890d09e531c671e582a18c85202: Come back once you have the real head!
textByHash.e3aac6627eb500e19347d8f393d00f3b93048bd1: When we heard, we decided to come up here and start up our own farm.
textByHash.e5d04a811964eb816251b2a4bc2e9fc7813d7469: The only thing without brains is you! Come back once you have the actual head!
textByHash.e9573a54f1b9d6cb21fcb1f04200619b8d2b5364: Well actually, there is something we've been having a problem with.
textByHash.ed909556fd9cacd22febc4166d45c054186daf08: Hello again. Thank you for dealing with that beast.
textByHash.edf4d87632b547f44187a39da6bb6f56ff17a8c3: Quite rare because they don't exist! I'm no fool, this is clearly a pretend head! It doesn't even have any fur!
textByHash.eedc6161fc65f3f587a3540093658687d7553b1e: A head like this deserves a place of honour! My friend, please could you mount it in our home?
textByHash.f8bfb7dee2fd5e7f31733ea166ee9d093abbf0b7: Hello again. Thank you for dealing with that beast. As promised, here's your reward.
textByHash.f9f4814643914744f05cf1ebfb74e387e668b5b6: Hello again. Do you have the head of that beast yet?
textByHash.fec68289a9ac41b0bdcff13dfabfb55c03294d4b: I understand. I'm sure someone else will be able to help.
